reason: Check canonical persistence, route behavior, focused RED/GREEN evidence, and release metadata only when source changes.
Check semantic TUI behavior, focused tests, typecheck, build, and workspace gates for any frontend change.

Compare final evidence with the pre-edit installed-runtime baseline.
Check visible terminal behavior against the project design system if hya-ts changes.
Check that child observation remains read-only and root prompt ownership is unchanged.
